ns0:entry.ns0:title: D-Ogi/WatermarkRemover-AI
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/D-Ogi/WatermarkRemover-AI
Language: html
AI-Powered Watermark Remover using Florence-2 and LaMA: Remove watermarks from images and videos, including AI-generated content from Sora, Runway, and others. Features a modern PyWebview GUI.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: adongwanai/AgentGuide
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/adongwanai/AgentGuide
Language: html
https://adongwanai.github.io/AgentGuide | AI Agent开发指南 | LangGraph实战 | 高级RAG | 转行大模型 | 大模型面试 | 算法工程师 | 面试题库 | 强化学习｜数据合成

ns0:entry.ns0:title: htr-tech/zphisher
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/htr-tech/zphisher
Language: html
An automated phishing tool with 30+ templates. This Tool is made for educational purpose only ! Author will not be responsible for any misuse of this toolkit !

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ossu/computer-science

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:title: sovereign/sovereign
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/sovereign/sovereign
Language: html
A set of Ansible playbooks to build and maintain your own private cloud: email, calendar, contacts, file sync, IRC bouncer, VPN, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: windmill-labs/windmill
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/windmill-labs/windmill
Language: html
Open-source developer platform to power your entire infra and turn scripts into webhooks, workflows and UIs. Fastest workflow engine (13x vs Airflow). Open-source alternative to Retool and Temporal.
